title: The Ark Maxim Starts Moving
description: Enel sets the Ark Maxim and his storm clouds against Skypiea while Luffy, Nami, and the others realize the island itself is in danger.
scene: Across pages 2, 3, 4, 5, this scene focuses on Enel, Luffy, Nami, Gan Fall, Pagaya. Enel sets the Ark Maxim and his storm clouds against Skypiea while Luffy, Nami, and the others realize the island itself is in danger.

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: The great engine of this ark,

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: And can't go up any further!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: But it's only a matter of time!

dialogue.speaker: Pagaya
dialogue.text: Luffy's a warrior of the Blue Seas!

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: Did something happen to our warriors...?

summary: Enel sets the Ark Maxim and his storm clouds against Skypiea while Luffy, Nami, and the others realize the island itself is in danger.
